title: cyclosorus stipellatus
intro: Cyclosorus stipellatus, also known as the stipellated cyclosorus or fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of various compounds, including flavonoids and saponins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Cyclosorus stipellatus can be prepared as a tea or infused in water to utilize its health benefits, which include reducing fever and alleviating gastrointestinal discomfort.
